chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7427 of 2019 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 24.02.2025 Mr. Aashiq Muhammad, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Irshad Ali, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Nazia Siddiqui, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. This petition is pending since 2019 for orders as to maintainability. The petitioner has assailed an auction conducted by the Nazir of this court, prima facie, in pursuance of judgment rendered by the superior court. Under such circumstances, no case is made out to entertain this petition. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed.. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
